title: [HMI] Pose Editor
description: {A menu for changing the poses of all objects and blocks, as well as changing the poses for the left and right hands}
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c185ed0366546aa20424a1e738761d2ee4f738fe.png)


![#  **To open the menu, press "N"** ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39c67eff74a9810995d69fcff3b17f0eeac3a7cc.png)
**⚙️(The current hotkey is "N", but you can change it in the game settings)**

![PLASHKA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/473e02259038db147a0581f8b27ac0c3455ff7ba.png)

## 📜 ABOUT

### **📁All positions are saved to a file** - `minecraft/config/hmieditor.json`
> ### - Sliders for PosX/posY/posZ, rotX/rotY/rotZ and scale.
> ### 
> ### - Edit the item that is in your hand.
> ### 
> ### - Switch between main and second hand.
> ### 
> ### - A separate hand pose editor.
> ### 
> ### - Templates: create, apply, rename and delete.
> ### 
> ### - Auto-save settings in the config
